2:85.base_text: Then here you are, killing yourselves and evicting a group of your own from their homes—backing each other against them in sin and hostility. And if they come to you as captives, you do ransom them, while their eviction is forbidden to you. Is it that you believe in part of the Scripture and deny part? So what is the repayment for those of you who do that but disgrace in the Earlier Life, and (that) on the Day of Resurrection they are turned back to the most severe punishment? For Allah is never oblivious of what you do.

2:85.shubah_ar_text: ثُمَّ أَنتُمۡ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ تَقۡتُلُونَ أَنفُسَكُمۡ وَتُخۡرِجُونَ فَرِيقٗا مِّنكُم مِّن دِيَٰرِهِمۡ تَظَٰهَرُونَ عَلَيۡهِم بِٱلۡإِثۡمِ وَٱلۡعُدۡوَٰنِ وَإِن يَأۡتُوكُمۡ أُسَٰرَىٰ تُفَٰدُوهُمۡ وَهُوَ مُحَرَّمٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡ إِخۡرَاجُهُمۡۚ أَفَتُؤۡمِنُونَ بِبَعۡضِ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ وَتَكۡفُرُونَ بِبَعۡضٖۚ فَمَا جَزَآءُ مَن يَفۡعَلُ ذَٰلِكَ مِنكُمۡ إِلَّا خِزۡيٞ فِي ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۖ وَيَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ يُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰٓ أَشَدِّ ٱلۡعَذَابِۗ وَمَا ٱللَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ

2:140.base_text: Or do you say that Abraham and Ishmael and Isaac and Jacob and the Grandsons were Jews or Christians? Say, "Do you know better or Allah?" And who is more unjust than one who conceals a testimony he has from Allah? For Allah is not oblivious of what you do.

2:140.shubah_ar_text: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ إِبۡرَٰهِـۧمَ وَإِسۡمَٰعِيلَ وَإِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ وَٱلۡأَسۡبَاطَ كَانُواْ هُودًا أَوۡ نَصَٰرَىٰۗ قُلۡ ءَأَنتُمۡ أَعۡلَمُ أَمِ ٱللَّهُۗ وَمَنۡ أَظۡلَمُ مِمَّن كَتَمَ شَهَٰدَةً عِندَهُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِۗ وَمَا ٱللَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ

2:222.base_text: And they ask yousg about menstruation. Say, “It is (a cause of) harm, so keeppl away from (sexual intercourse with) women during menstruation, and do not approach them until they are clean. But once they have cleansed themselves, then approach them from where Allah has commanded you.” Indeed, Allah loves those who frequently repent, and He loves those who cleanse themselves.”

2:222.shubah_ar_text: وَيَسۡـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلۡمَحِيضِۖ قُلۡ هُوَ أَذٗى فَٱعۡتَزِلُواْ ٱلنِّسَآءَ فِي ٱلۡمَحِيضِ وَلَا تَقۡرَبُوهُنَّ حَتَّىٰ يَطَّهَّرۡنَۖ فَإِذَا تَطَهَّرۡنَ فَأۡتُوهُنَّ مِنۡ حَيۡثُ أَمَرَكُمُ ٱللَّهُۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلتَّوَّٰبِينَ وَيُحِبُّ ٱلۡمُتَطَهِّرِينَ

2:240.base_text: Moreover, those of you (men) who are taken at death and leave spouses behind—(let them bequeath) a bequest for their spouses with compensation for a year without eviction (from the husband’s residence). But if they depart, then no sin is committed by youpl regarding what they have done with themselves in accordance with what is fair. For Allah is Almighty, All-Wise.
2:240.shubah_text: and leave spouses behind—a bequest (is ordained upon them) for their spouses with compensation

2:240.shubah_ar_text: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُتَوَفَّوۡنَ مِنكُمۡ وَيَذَرُونَ أَزۡوَٰجٗا وَصِيَّةٞ لِّأَزۡوَٰجِهِم مَّتَٰعًا إِلَى ٱلۡحَوۡلِ غَيۡرَ إِخۡرَاجٖۚ فَإِنۡ خَرَجۡنَ فَلَا جُنَاحَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ فِي مَا فَعَلۡنَ فِيٓ أَنفُسِهِنَّ مِن مَّعۡرُوفٖۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَزِيزٌ حَكِيمٞ

2:271.base_text: If youpl disclose donations, then that is excellent. But if youpl hide them and bring them to the needy, then that is better for you. And He will remit your evil deeds for you. For Allah is All-Aware of what you do.
2:271.shubah_text: then that is better for you. And We will remit your evil deeds for you.

2:279.base_text: But if youpl do not, then be informed of a war from Allah and His Messenger. Yet if you repent, then your capitals belong to you— (thus) you do no injustice, and you are not done injustice.

2:279.shubah_ar_text: فَإِن لَّمۡ تَفۡعَلُواْ فَـَٔاذِنُواْ بِحَرۡبٖ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦۖ وَإِن تُبۡتُمۡ فَلَكُمۡ رُءُوسُ أَمۡوَٰلِكُمۡ لَا تَظۡلِمُونَ وَلَا تُظۡلَمُونَ

3:36.base_text: I have indeed given birth to her, a female,” and Allah knows better what she has delivered,

3:115.base_text: And whatever good they do, they will not be denied it, for Allah is All-Knowing of those who are mindful (of Him).

3:157.base_text: Thus if youpl get killed in the way of Allah or die— surely, forgiveness and mercy from Allah are better than what they hoard.

3:187.base_text: And as Allah took a pledge from those who were brought the Scripture: “Most surely you shall make it evident to mankind and not conceal it.” But they tossed it behind their backs and purchased, in exchange for it, a small price, so how miserable is what they purchase!

4:10.base_text: Indeed, those who devour the wealths of orphans illicitly devour only fire into their bellies; and they will roast in a blaze.

4:11.base_text: Allah enjoins youpl regarding your children: for the male is the equivalent of the share of two females. But if they are women above two, they get two-thirds of what he has left; and if she be one, then to her is the half. And for his parents—each gets one-sixth of what he has left if he has children. Yet if he has no children and his parents inherit (solely) from him, then his mother gets one-third. But if he has siblings, then his mother gets one-sixth, after )fulfilling( any bequest he may bequeath and (paying off( any debt. Your parents and your children—you do not know which are more beneficial to you. (This is) an ordinance from Allah. Indeed, Allah has always been All-Knowing All-Wise.
4:11.shubah_text: . . . after )fulfilling( any bequest that is bequeathed . . .

4:19.base_text: O you who have attained faith, it is not lawful for you to inherit women forcefully, and do not coerce them in order to go away with some of what you have brought them, unless they commit an evident obscenity. And let your pl relationship with them be in accordance with what is fair. And if you dislike them, it may be that you dislike something in which Allah has placed much good.

4:24.base_text: And (also prohibited are) women in wedlock, except those whom youpl rightfully possess. (This is) Allah’s decree, binding upon you. But anything beyond these limits has been made lawful for you, provided you seek them in wedlock, not in fornication, with (dowries from) your own wealths. So if you wish to enjoy them, then bring them their rewards— (as) an obligation. And no sin is committed by you if you agree to any change to the dowry after establishing the obligation. Indeed, Allah has always been All-Knowing, All-Wise.
4:24.shubah_text: But He has made anything beyond these limits lawful for you.

4:124.base_text: But whoever does of righteous deeds, whether male or female, and is a believer—those will enter the Garden (of Paradise) and will not be dealt with unjustly by as much as the dint on a date-stone.

4:152.base_text: But those who have attained faith in Allah and His messengers and have made no distinction between any of them—those, He will bring them their rewards. For Allah has always been Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.

4:153.base_text: The People of the Scripture ask yousg to bestow upon them a scripture from heaven. For truly, they had asked Moses for something even greater than that, for they said, “Show us Allah openly.” So the thunderbolt took them on account of their injustice. Then they took the calf for worship after the evident proofs had come to them, yet We pardoned that, and We brought Moses evident authority.
4:153.shubah_ar_text: يَسۡـَٔلُكَ أَهۡلُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ أَن تُنَزِّلَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ كِتَٰبٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِۚ فَقَدۡ سَأَلُواْ مُوسَىٰٓ أَكۡبَرَ مِن ذَٰلِكَ فَقَالُوٓاْ أَرِنَا ٱللَّهَ جَهۡرَةٗ فَأَخَذَتۡهُمُ ٱلصَّٰعِقَةُ بِظُلۡمِهِمۡۚ ثُمَّ ٱتَّخَذُواْ ٱلۡعِجۡلَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ مَا جَآءَتۡهُمُ ٱلۡبَيِّنَٰتُ فَعَفَوۡنَا عَن ذَٰلِكَۚ وَءَاتَيۡنَا مُوسَىٰ سُلۡطَٰنٗا مُّبِينٗا

5:2.base_text: O you who have attained faith, do not violate Allah’s rites, nor the inviolable month, nor the offerings, nor the garlanded, nor those heading for the Inviolable House seeking grace and good pleasure from their Lord. And when you have left the pilgrim sanctity, then hunt. And let not the hatred of any people incite you to transgress because they barred you from the Inviolable Mosque. And cooperate with one another in showing virtue and mindfulness (of God), and do not cooperate with one another in sin and hostility. And be mindful of Allah; indeed, Allah is stern in retribution.

And cooperate with one another in showing virtue and mindfulness (of God), and do not cooperate with one another in sin and hostility. And be mindful of Allah; indeed, Allah is stern in retribution.

5:6.base_text: O you who have attained faith, when you rise for prayer, wash your faces and your hands up to the elbows, and wipe your heads and (wash) your feet to the ankles. But if you are in a state of major impurity, then cleanse yourselves. But if you are ill or traveling or one of you returns from relieving himself or you have touched women (in intercourse) and cannot find water, then seek clean soil and wipe over your faces and hands with it. Allah does not want to cause you discomfort; rather He wants to cleanse you and to complete His blessing upon you, that you may give thanks.

5:8.base_text: O you who have attained faith, stand firmly for Allah (as) just witnesses, and let not the hatred of any people provoke you to be unjust. Be just—that is nearer to mindfulness (of God). And be mindful of Allah; indeed, Allah is All-Aware of all that you do.

5:67.base_text: O Messenger, proclaim what was sent down to you from your Lord; but if you do not, then you will not have proclaimed His message, for Allah safeguards you from mankind. Indeed, Allah does not guide the denying people.

5:89.base_text: Allah does not hold youpl accountable for idle talk involving your oaths, but He holds you accountable for your firm binding of oaths; so its atonement is by feeding ten destitute people from the best of what you feed your families, or by clothing them, or by freeing a slave. But if anyone does not find (the means), then fasting for three days. That is the atonement for (breaking) your oaths when you have sworn them. So keep your oaths. Allah thus clarifies His signs for you, that you may give thanks.

5:107.base_text: So if it is discovered that both of them are guilty (of perjury), then two others deserve to take their place from among those responsible for the claim—the two most concerned—and have them swear by Allah, “Our testimony is more truthful than their testimony, and we have not transgressed; we would then most surely be of the unjust.”
5:107.shubah_text: . . . from among those who were given the responsibility of the claim—the two . . .

6:16.base_text: Whoever is spared on that day—then He has surely had mercy on him, and that is the evident triumph.
6:16.shubah_text: Whoever He spares on that day—then He has surely had mercy on him

6:23.base_text: Then their only turmoil was when they said, “By Allah, our Lord, we were not polytheists.”
6:23.shubah_text: Then their saying, ‘By Allah, our Lord, we were not polytheists’ was their only turmoil.
6:23.hafs_text: Then their only turmoil was when they said, “By Allah, our Lord, we were not polytheists.”

6:27.base_text: And if only you could see when they were made to stand by the Fire and they said, “If only we could be sent back and not disbelieve in the signs of our Lord and be of the believers!”
6:27.shubah_text: If only we could be sent back—for we do not disbelieve in the signs of our Lord—and be of the believers!
6:27.hafs_text: And if only you could see when they were made to stand by the Fire and they said, “If only we could be sent back and not disbelieve in the signs of our Lord and be of the believers!”

6:32.base_text: but the Home of the Hereafter is definitely better for those who are mindful (of God). Do you not reason?
6:32.hafs_text: but the Home of the Hereafter is definitely better for those who are mindful (of God). Do you not reason?
6:32.shubah_ar_text: وَمَا ٱلۡحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنۡيَآ إِلَّا لَعِبٞ وَلَهۡوٞۖ وَلَلدَّارُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَۚ أَفَلَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
6:32.hafs_ar_text: وَمَا ٱلۡحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنۡيَآ إِلَّا لَعِبٞ وَلَهۡوٞۖ وَلَلدَّارُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ يَتَّقُونَۚ أَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُونَ

6:109.base_text: And they swore by Allah their most solemn oaths that if a sign were to come to them, they would believe in it. Say, “Signs are only with Allah,” but how do you know that even if it did come, they would still not believe?
6:109.shubah_text: but how do you know? Indeed, even if it did come they would still not believe.
6:109.hafs_text: And they swore by Allah their most solemn oaths that if a sign were to come to them, they would believe in it. Say, “Signs are only with Allah,” but how do you know that even if it did come, they would still not believe?
6:109.shubah_ar_text: وَأَقۡسَمُواْ بِٱللَّهِ جَهۡدَ أَيۡمَٰنِهِمۡ لَئِن جَآءَتۡهُمۡ ءَايَةٞ لَّيُؤۡمِنُنَّ بِهَاۚ قُلۡ إِنَّمَا ٱلۡأٓيَٰتُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِۖ وَمَا يُشۡعِرُكُمۡ أَنَّهَآ إِذَا جَآءَتۡ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ

6:114.base_text: “Shall I seek a judge other than Allah when He is the One Who sent down to you the Scripture, explained in detail?” And those to whom We gave the Scripture know that it is the truth, bestowed from on high by your Lord, so never be of those who doubt.
6:114.hafs_text: “Shall I seek a judge other than Allah when He is the One Who sent down to you the Scripture, explained in detail?” And those to whom We gave the Scripture know that it is the truth, bestowed from on high by your Lord, so never be of those who doubt.
6:114.shubah_ar_text: أَفَغَيۡرَ ٱللَّهِ أَبۡتَغِي حَكَمٗا وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَنزَلَ إِلَيۡكُمُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ مُفَصَّلٗاۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَاتَيۡنَٰهُمُ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ يَعۡلَمُونَ أَنَّهُۥ مُنزَلٞ مِّن رَّبِّكَ بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ فَلَا تَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡمُمۡتَرِينَ

6:119.base_text: And why should you not eat of that over which the Name of Allah has been mentioned when He has detailed for you what He has prohibited for you, except that to which you are compelled? And many do indeed lead (others) astray with their whims without (any) knowledge. Indeed, yoursg Lord knows better who the transgressors are.
6:119.shubah_text: when He has detailed for you what has been prohibited for you

And many do indeed lead (others) astray with their whims without (any) knowledge. Indeed, yoursg Lord knows better who the transgressors are.
6:119.shubah_ar_text: وَمَا لَكُمۡ أَلَّا تَأۡكُلُواْ مِمَّا ذُكِرَ ٱسۡمُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيۡهِ وَقَدۡ فَصَّلَ لَكُم مَّا حُرِّمَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ إِلَّا مَا ٱضۡطُرِرۡتُمۡ إِلَيۡهِۗ وَإِنَّ كَثِيرٗا لَّيُضِلُّونَ بِأَهۡوَآئِهِم بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٍۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِٱلۡمُعۡتَدِينَ

6:124.base_text: And when a sign comes to them, they say, “We will not believe unless we are brought the like of what was brought to Allah’s messengers.” Allah knows better where to set His message. Abasement (decreed) by Allah will afflict those who committed crimes, and severe punishment (too), on account of what they used to scheme.
6:124.hafs_text: And when a sign comes to them, they say, “We will not believe unless we are brought the like of what was brought to Allah’s messengers.” Allah knows better where to set His message. Abasement (decreed) by Allah will afflict those who committed crimes, and severe punishment (too), on account of what they used to scheme.
6:124.shubah_ar_text: وَإِذَا جَآءَتۡهُمۡ ءَايَةٞ قَالُواْ لَن نُّؤۡمِنَ حَتَّىٰ نُؤۡتَىٰ مِثۡلَ مَآ أُوتِيَ رُسُلُ ٱللَّهِۘ ٱللَّهُ أَعۡلَمُ حَيۡثُ يَجۡعَلُ رِسَٰلَٰتِهِۦۗ سَيُصِيبُ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجۡرَمُواْ صَغَارٌ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَعَذَابٞ شَدِيدُۢ بِمَا كَانُواْ يَمۡكُرُونَ

6:125.base_text: Whomever Allah wants to guide, He expands his chest to (accept) Islam; and whomever He wants to lead astray, He makes his chest tight, constricted, as though he were gradually ascending in the sky. Allah thus lays abomination upon those who do not believe.
6:125.shubah_text: as though he were ascending on and on in the sky.
6:125.hafs_text: Whomever Allah wants to guide, He expands his chest to (accept) Islam; and whomever He wants to lead astray, He makes his chest tight, constricted, as though he were gradually ascending in the sky. Allah thus lays abomination upon those who do not believe.
6:125.shubah_ar_text: فَمَن يُرِدِ ٱللَّهُ أَن يَهۡدِيَهُۥ يَشۡرَحۡ صَدۡرَهُۥ لِلۡإِسۡلَٰمِۖ وَمَن يُرِدۡ أَن يُضِلَّهُۥ يَجۡعَلۡ صَدۡرَهُۥ ضَيِّقًا حَرِجٗا كَأَنَّمَا يَصَّٰعَدُ فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَجۡعَلُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلرِّجۡسَ عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُونَ

6:128.base_text: Thus on the day He herds them all together: “O assembly of unseen beings, you have surely done so much against humans.” But their allies among humans said, “Our Lord, we enjoyed one another, and we have reached the term that you have assigned for us.” He said, “The Fire is your dwelling, wherein you abide, except as Allah wills. Indeed, your Lord is All-Wise, All-Knowing.

6:135.base_text: Say, “O my people, act according to your position, surely, I am also acting (according to mine); then you will come to know who will have the future outcome of the (final) Home. Indeed, the unjust never succeed.”
6:135.hafs_text: Say, “O my people, act according to your position, surely, I am also acting (according to mine); then you will come to know who will have the future outcome of the (final) Home. Indeed, the unjust never succeed.”

6:152.base_text: And you shall not come near the wealth of the orphan except with the best (intentions) until he reaches his full strength. And you shall give full measure and full weight with justice—We never task any self beyond its capacity. And when youpl speak, you shall be fair, even if it concerns a relative. And you shall fulfil your covenant with Allah. All this He has enjoined upon you, that you may remember.

7:3.base_text: “Followpl what was sent down to you from your Lord, and do not follow other guardians apart from Him. Little do you remind yourselves.”
7:3.hafs_text: “Followpl what was sent down to you from your Lord, and do not follow other guardians apart from Him. Little do you remind yourselves.”

7:38.base_text: He said, “Each will have double, but you know not.”

7:54.base_text: He causes the night to overwhelm the day, pursuing it persistently, for the sun and the moon and the stars are subjected by His command.
7:54.shubah_text: He causes the night to tightly overwhelm the day . . .

7:57.base_text: And it is He Who sends the winds as heralds of glad tidings ahead of His mercy until, when they carry up heavy clouds, We drive them to a lifeless land where We send down water, and with it We bring out all kinds of products. Thus We bring out the dead, that you may remind yourselves.
7:57.hafs_text: And it is He Who sends the winds as heralds of glad tidings ahead of His mercy until, when they carry up heavy clouds, We drive them to a lifeless land where We send down water, and with it We bring out all kinds of products. Thus We bring out the dead, that you may remind yourselves.
7:57.shubah_ar_text: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُرۡسِلُ ٱلرِّيَٰحَ بُشۡرَۢا بَيۡنَ يَدَيۡ رَحۡمَتِهِۦۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَقَلَّتۡ سَحَابٗا ثِقَالٗا سُقۡنَٰهُ لِبَلَدٖ مَّيۡتٖ فَأَنزَلۡنَا بِهِ ٱلۡمَآءَ فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهِۦ مِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نُخۡرِجُ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَّكَّرُونَ

7:169.base_text: Thus they were succeeded by generations who inherited the Scripture while seizing the materials of this lower (world), and saying, “We will be forgiven.” And should similar materials come their way, they would again seize them. Was not the pledge of the Scripture taken by them, to say nothing about Allah but the truth? Did they not study its contents? But the Home of the Hereafter is better for the mindfulpl (of God). Will you not reason?

7:170.base_text: And those who adhere strictly to the Scripture and have established the prayer—indeed, We do not waste the reward of the reformers.

8:19.base_text: “If youpl desire a conquest, then the conquest has come to you; and if you desist, it would be better for you. But if you return, We will return; and your battalion, however numerous, will not avail you in anything. And (know) that Allah is with the believers.”

9:24.base_text: Say, “If your fathers, and your sons, and your brethren, and your spouses, and your kinsfolk, and wealths you have acquired, and a trade wherein you fear decline, and homes that well please you are more beloved to you than Allah and His Messenger and striving in His way, then wait until Allah brings about His command.” And Allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people.

9:37.base_text: Indeed, postponing the inviolable months is but another act of denial by which those who have denied are led astray. They allow it one year and forbid it another year in order to conform to the number made inviolable by Allah, thus permitting what Allah has forbidden. The evil of their deeds was adorned to them. And Allah does not guide the denying people.

9:103.base_text: Take a donation from their wealths to sanctify them and purify them with, and pray for them; indeed, your prayer is (a source of) rest for them. And Allah is All-Hearing, All-Knowing.

10:3.base_text: Indeed, your Lord is Allah, Who created the heavens and the earth in six days then settled over the Throne, governing every matter; there is no intercessor except after His permission. Such is Allah, your Lord, so worship Him. Will you not remind yourselves?

10:5.base_text: It is He Who made the sun radiance and the moon a light and determined phases for it, that you may know the number of years and the calculation. Allah did not create all this except with the truth. He details the signs for people who know.
10:5.hafs_text: It is He Who made the sun radiance and the moon a light and determined phases for it, that you may know the number of years and the calculation. Allah did not create all this except with the truth. He details the signs for people who know.
10:5.shubah_ar_text: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ ٱلشَّمۡسَ ضِيَآءٗ وَٱلۡقَمَرَ نُورٗا وَقَدَّرَهُۥ مَنَازِلَ لِتَعۡلَمُواْ عَدَدَ ٱلسِّنِينَ وَٱلۡحِسَابَۚ مَا خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ ذَٰلِكَ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّۚ نُفَصِّلُ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِ لِقَوۡمٖ يَعۡلَمُونَ
10:5.hafs_ar_text: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ ٱلشَّمۡسَ ضِيَآءٗ وَٱلۡقَمَرَ نُورٗا وَقَدَّرَهُۥ مَنَازِلَ لِتَعۡلَمُواْ عَدَدَ ٱلسِّنِينَ وَٱلۡحِسَابَۚ مَا خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ ذَٰلِكَ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّۚ يُفَصِّلُ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِ لِقَوۡمٖ يَعۡلَمُونَ

10:23.base_text: But when He has saved them, there they are, committing unjustified aggression in the land. O mankind, your oppression is only against yourselves— (you only enjoy) the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, then to Us is your return and We will inform you of what you used to do.
10:23.shubah_text: O mankind, your oppression against yourselves is (only) the enjoyment of the Earlier Life
10:23.hafs_text: But when He has saved them, there they are, committing unjustified aggression in the land. O mankind, your oppression is only against yourselves— (you only enjoy) the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, then to Us is your return and We will inform you of what you used to do.
10:23.shubah_ar_text: فَلَمَّآ أَنجَىٰهُمۡ إِذَا هُمۡ يَبۡغُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ بِغَيۡرِ ٱلۡحَقِّۗ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ إِنَّمَا بَغۡيُكُمۡ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِكُمۖ مَّتَٰعُ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۖ ثُمَّ إِلَيۡنَا مَرۡجِعُكُمۡ فَنُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
10:23.hafs_ar_text: فَلَمَّآ أَنجَىٰهُمۡ إِذَا هُمۡ يَبۡغُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ بِغَيۡرِ ٱلۡحَقِّۗ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ إِنَّمَا بَغۡيُكُمۡ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِكُمۖ مَّتَٰعَ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۖ ثُمَّ إِلَيۡنَا مَرۡجِعُكُمۡ فَنُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ

10:45.base_text: And on the day when He herds them, (it will be) as if they had remained for only one hour of a day, getting to know one another. Those who disbelieved the meeting with Allah have certainly lost and were not guided.
10:45.hafs_text: And on the day when He herds them, (it will be) as if they had remained for only one hour of a day, getting to know one another. Those who disbelieved the meeting with Allah have certainly lost and were not guided.
10:45.shubah_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ نَحۡشُرُهُمۡ كَأَن لَّمۡ يَلۡبَثُوٓاْ إِلَّا سَاعَةٗ مِّنَ ٱلنَّهَارِ يَتَعَارَفُونَ بَيۡنَهُمۡۚ قَدۡ خَسِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ بِلِقَآءِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا كَانُواْ مُهۡتَدِينَ
10:45.hafs_ar_text: وَيَوۡمَ يَحۡشُرُهُمۡ كَأَن لَّمۡ يَلۡبَثُوٓاْ إِلَّا سَاعَةٗ مِّنَ ٱلنَّهَارِ يَتَعَارَفُونَ بَيۡنَهُمۡۚ قَدۡ خَسِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُواْ بِلِقَآءِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا كَانُواْ مُهۡتَدِينَ

10:100.base_text: And never could a single self believe except by Allah’s leave. And He lays abomination upon those who do not reason.
10:100.shubah_text: And never could a single self believe except by Allah’s leave. And We lay abomination upon those who do not reason.
10:100.hafs_text: And never could a single self believe except by Allah’s leave. And He lays abomination upon those who do not reason.
10:100.shubah_ar_text: وَمَا كَانَ لِنَفۡسٍ أَن تُؤۡمِنَ إِلَّا بِإِذۡنِ ٱللَّهِۚ وَنَجۡعَلُ ٱلرِّجۡسَ عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعۡقِلُونَ
10:100.hafs_ar_text: وَمَا كَانَ لِنَفۡسٍ أَن تُؤۡمِنَ إِلَّا بِإِذۡنِ ٱللَّهِۚ وَيَجۡعَلُ ٱلرِّجۡسَ عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعۡقِلُونَ

10:103.base_text: Then We deliver Our messengers and those who have attained faith. Thus it is binding upon Us to saved the believers.
10:103.shubah_text: Then We deliver Our messengers and those who have attained faith. Thus it is binding upon Us to deliver the believers.
10:103.hafs_text: Then We deliver Our messengers and those who have attained faith. Thus it is binding upon Us to saved the believers.
10:103.shubah_ar_text: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّي رُسُلَنَا وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۚ كَذَٰلِكَ حَقًّا عَلَيۡنَا نُنَجِّ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ
10:103.hafs_ar_text: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّي رُسُلَنَا وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۚ كَذَٰلِكَ حَقًّا عَلَيۡنَا نُنجِ ٱلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ

11:24.base_text: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not remind yourselves?
11:24.shubah_text: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not constantly remember?
11:24.hafs_text: The parable of the two groups is that of one who is blind and deaf, and one who is seeing and hearing. Are they equal in similitude? Will you not remind yourselves?
11:24.shubah_ar_text: ۞ مَثَلُ ٱلۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ كَٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَٱلۡأَصَمِّ وَٱلۡبَصِيرِ وَٱلسَّمِيعِۚ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًاۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
11:24.hafs_ar_text: ۞ مَثَلُ ٱلۡفَرِيقَيۡنِ كَٱلۡأَعۡمَىٰ وَٱلۡأَصَمِّ وَٱلۡبَصِيرِ وَٱلسَّمِيعِۚ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًاۚ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ

11:28.base_text: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it was made invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?
11:28.shubah_text: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it became invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?
11:28.hafs_text: He said, “O my people, have you seen? What if I rely on evident proof from my Lord, and He has given me a mercy of His own, but it was made invisible to you —can we compel you to accept it even though you dislike it?
11:28.shubah_ar_text: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّي وَءَاتَىٰنِي رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ عِندِهِۦ فَعَمِيَتۡ عَلَيۡكُمۡ أَنُلۡزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمۡ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَ
11:28.hafs_ar_text: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِن كُنتُ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَةٖ مِّن رَّبِّي وَءَاتَىٰنِي رَحۡمَةٗ مِّنۡ عِندِهِۦ فَعُمِّيَتۡ عَلَيۡكُمۡ أَنُلۡزِمُكُمُوهَا وَأَنتُمۡ لَهَا كَٰرِهُونَ

11:30.base_text: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not remind yourselves?
11:30.shubah_text: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not constantly remember?
11:30.hafs_text: And O my people, who will support me against Allah if I expel them? Will you not remind yourselves?
11:30.shubah_ar_text: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ مَن يَنصُرُنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمۡۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
11:30.hafs_ar_text: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ مَن يَنصُرُنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهِ إِن طَرَدتُّهُمۡۚ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ

11:40.base_text: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each kind, a male and female coupled, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.
11:40.shubah_text: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each female and male kind, one couple, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.
11:40.hafs_text: Until, when Our command came and the oven overflowed, We said, “Carry in it, of each kind, a male and female coupled, and your family—except those against whom the sentence has already been passed—and those who have attained faith.” But none attained faith with him except a few.
11:40.shubah_ar_text: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَ أَمۡرُنَا وَفَارَ ٱلتَّنُّورُ قُلۡنَا ٱحۡمِلۡ فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجَيۡنِ ٱثۡنَيۡنِ وَأَهۡلَكَ إِلَّا مَن سَبَقَ عَلَيۡهِ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ وَمَنۡ ءَامَنَۚ وَمَآ ءَامَنَ مَعَهُۥٓ إِلَّا قَلِيلٞ

11:87.base_text: They said, “O Shuaib, does your prayer command you that we abandon what our fathers worship or that we should not do with our wealth whatever we will? Very truly, you are the forbearing, prudent one!”
11:87.shubah_text: They said, “O Shuaib, do your prayers command you that we abandon what our fathers worship or that we should not do with our wealth whatever we will? Very truly, you are the forbearing, prudent one!”
11:87.hafs_text: They said, “O Shuaib, does your prayer command you that we abandon what our fathers worship or that we should not do with our wealth whatever we will? Very truly, you are the forbearing, prudent one!”
11:87.shubah_ar_text: قَالُواْ يَٰشُعَيۡبُ أَصَلَوَٰتُكَ تَأۡمُرُكَ أَن نَّتۡرُكَ مَا يَعۡبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَآ أَوۡ أَن نَّفۡعَلَ فِيٓ أَمۡوَٰلِنَا مَا نَشَٰٓؤُاْۖ إِنَّكَ لَأَنتَ ٱلۡحَلِيمُ ٱلرَّشِيدُ
11:87.hafs_ar_text: قَالُواْ يَٰشُعَيۡبُ أَصَلَوٰتُكَ تَأۡمُرُكَ أَن نَّتۡرُكَ مَا يَعۡبُدُ ءَابَآؤُنَآ أَوۡ أَن نَّفۡعَلَ فِيٓ أَمۡوَٰلِنَا مَا نَشَٰٓؤُاْۖ إِنَّكَ لَأَنتَ ٱلۡحَلِيمُ ٱلرَّشِيدُ

11:93.base_text: And O my people, act according to your position; surely, I am also acting (according to mine); you will know to whom will come a punishment that disgraces him and who it is that is a liar. So wait and watch; surely I too am watching out with you.”

11:93.shubah_ar_text: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ ٱعۡمَلُواْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَٰتِكُمۡ إِنِّي عَٰمِلٞۖ سَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُونَ مَن يَأۡتِيهِ عَذَابٞ يُخۡزِيهِ وَمَنۡ هُوَ كَٰذِبٞۖ وَٱرۡتَقِبُوٓاْ إِنِّي مَعَكُمۡ رَقِيبٞ
11:93.hafs_ar_text: وَيَٰقَوۡمِ ٱعۡمَلُواْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِكُمۡ إِنِّي عَٰمِلٞۖ سَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُونَ مَن يَأۡتِيهِ عَذَابٞ يُخۡزِيهِ وَمَنۡ هُوَ كَٰذِبٞۖ وَٱرۡتَقِبُوٓاْ إِنِّي مَعَكُمۡ رَقِيبٞ

11:108.base_text: And as for the ones who have been granted happiness, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.
11:108.shubah_text: And as for the ones who have become happy, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.
11:108.hafs_text: And as for the ones who have been granted happiness, they are in the Garden (of Paradise), abiding therein for as long as the heavens and the earth remain, except as your Lord has willed—an uninterrupted grant.
11:108.shubah_ar_text: ۞ وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ سَعِدُواْ فَفِي ٱلۡجَنَّةِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا مَا دَامَتِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ وَٱلۡأَرۡضُ إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ رَبُّكَۖ عَطَآءً غَيۡرَ مَجۡذُوذٖ

11:111.base_text: Yet indeed, to every one of them your Lord will certainly render in full (the reward) for their deeds; indeed, He is All-Aware of what they do.
11:111.shubah_text: Yet to every one of them, your Lord will certainly render in full (the reward) for their deeds; indeed, He is All-Aware of what they do.
11:111.hafs_text: Yet indeed, to every one of them your Lord will certainly render in full (the reward) for their deeds; indeed, He is All-Aware of what they do.
11:111.shubah_ar_text: وَإِن كُلّٗا لَّمَّا لَيُوَفِّيَنَّهُمۡ رَبُّكَ أَعۡمَٰلَهُمۡۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِمَا يَعۡمَلُونَ خَبِيرٞ

11:121.base_text: And say to those who do not believe, “Act according to your position; surely, we are also acting (according to ours).

11:123.base_text: And to Allah belongs the hidden realm of the heavens and the earth, and to Him every matter is returned. So worshipsg Him and place your trust in Him, for your Lord is not oblivious of what youpl do.

12:62.base_text: So he said to his young assistants, “Put their goods in their saddlebags; perhaps they will recognize them when they return to their families so that they may come back.”
12:62.shubah_text: So he said to his few young assistants, “Put their goods in their saddlebags; perhaps they will recognize them when they return to their families so that they may come back.”
12:62.hafs_text: So he said to his young assistants, “Put their goods in their saddlebags; perhaps they will recognize them when they return to their families so that they may come back.”
12:62.shubah_ar_text: وَقَالَ لِفِتۡيَتِهِ ٱجۡعَلُواْ بِضَٰعَتَهُمۡ فِي رِحَالِهِمۡ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَعۡرِفُونَهَآ إِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓاْ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِمۡ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَرۡجِعُونَ
12:62.hafs_ar_text: وَقَالَ لِفِتۡيَٰنِهِ ٱجۡعَلُواْ بِضَٰعَتَهُمۡ فِي رِحَالِهِمۡ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَعۡرِفُونَهَآ إِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓاْ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِمۡ لَعَلَّهُمۡ يَرۡجِعُونَ

12:64.base_text: He said, “Am I to entrust him to you as I entrusted his brother to you before? Allah is a Better Preserver, and He is the Most Merciful of the merciful ones.”
12:64.shubah_text: He said, “Am I to entrust him to you as I entrusted his brother to you before? Allah is a Better Preserver, and He is the Most Merciful of the merciful ones.”
12:64.hafs_text: He said, “Am I to entrust him to you as I entrusted his brother to you before? Allah is Better in preservation, and He is the Most Merciful of the merciful ones.”
12:64.shubah_ar_text: قَالَ هَلۡ ءَامَنُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ إِلَّا كَمَآ أَمِنتُكُمۡ عَلَىٰٓ أَخِيهِ مِن قَبۡلُ فَٱللَّهُ خَيۡرٌ حِفۡظٗاۖ وَهُوَ أَرۡحَمُ ٱلرَّٰحِمِينَ
12:64.hafs_ar_text: قَالَ هَلۡ ءَامَنُكُمۡ عَلَيۡهِ إِلَّا كَمَآ أَمِنتُكُمۡ عَلَىٰٓ أَخِيهِ مِن قَبۡلُ فَٱللَّهُ خَيۡرٌ حَٰفِظٗاۖ وَهُوَ أَرۡحَمُ ٱلرَّٰحِمِينَ

12:109.base_text: And in no way did We send (any messengers) before yousg except men to whom We reveal, from among the people of the towns. Have they not journeyed through the earth and looked at what the outcome was for those before them? The Home of the Hereafter is surely better for those who have been mindful (of God). Do youpl not reason?
12:109.shubah_text: . . . except men to whom it is revealed, from among . . .
12:109.hafs_text: And in no way did We send (any messengers) before yousg except men to whom We reveal, from among the people of the towns. Have they not journeyed through the earth and looked at what the outcome was for those before them? The Home of the Hereafter is surely better for those who have been mindful (of God). Do youpl not reason?
12:109.shubah_ar_text: وَمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِكَ إِلَّا رِجَالٗا يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَيۡهِم مِّنۡ أَهۡلِ ٱلۡقُرَىٰٓۗ أَفَلَمۡ يَسِيرُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَيَنظُرُواْ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡۗ وَلَدَارُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوۡاْۚ أَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُونَ
12:109.hafs_ar_text: وَمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا مِن قَبۡلِكَ إِلَّا رِجَالٗا نُّوحِيٓ إِلَيۡهِم مِّنۡ أَهۡلِ ٱلۡقُرَىٰٓۗ أَفَلَمۡ يَسِيرُواْ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ فَيَنظُرُواْ كَيۡفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡۗ وَلَدَارُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ خَيۡرٞ لِّلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوۡاْۚ أَفَلَا تَعۡقِلُونَ

13:3.base_text: And He is the One Who spread the land and made in it firm mountains and rivers, and of all products he made therein two pairs; He causes the night to overwhelm the day; indeed, in that are signs for people who reflect.
13:3.shubah_text: . . . the night to tightly overwhelm the day . . .
13:3.hafs_text: And He is the One Who spread the land and made in it firm mountains and rivers, and of all products he made therein two pairs; He causes the night to overwhelm the day; indeed, in that are signs for people who reflect.
13:3.shubah_ar_text: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي مَدَّ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَجَعَلَ فِيهَا رَوَٰسِيَ وَأَنۡهَٰرٗاۖ وَمِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ جَعَلَ فِيهَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ ٱثۡنَيۡنِۖ يُغَشِّي ٱلَّيۡلَ ٱلنَّهَارَۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
13:3.hafs_ar_text: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي مَدَّ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَجَعَلَ فِيهَا رَوَٰسِيَ وَأَنۡهَٰرٗاۖ وَمِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ جَعَلَ فِيهَا زَوۡجَيۡنِ ٱثۡنَيۡنِۖ يُغۡشِي ٱلَّيۡلَ ٱلنَّهَارَۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ

13:4.base_text: And in the land are neighboring plots and gardens of vines, and vegetation, and date-palms—from the same root or from distinct roots—irrigated with the same water, yet We make the produce of some taste better than others; most surely, in that are signs for people who reason.
13:4.shubah_text: . . . neighboring plots and gardens of vines and (of) vegetation and (of) date-palms . . .
13:4.hafs_text: And in the land are neighboring plots and gardens of vines, and vegetation, and date-palms—from the same root or from distinct roots—irrigated with the same water, yet We make the produce of some taste better than others; most surely, in that are signs for people who reason.
13:4.shubah_ar_text: وَفِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ قِطَعٞ مُّتَجَٰوِرَٰتٞ وَجَنَّٰتٞ مِّنۡ أَعۡنَٰبٖ وَزَرۡعٖ وَنَخِيلٖ صِنۡوَانٖ وَغَيۡرِ صِنۡوَانٖ يُسۡقَىٰ بِمَآءٖ وَٰحِدٖ وَنُفَضِّلُ بَعۡضَهَا عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖ فِي ٱلۡأُكُلِۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَعۡقِلُونَ
13:4.hafs_ar_text: وَفِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ قِطَعٞ مُّتَجَٰوِرَٰتٞ وَجَنَّٰتٞ مِّنۡ أَعۡنَٰبٖ وَزَرۡعٞ وَنَخِيلٞ صِنۡوَانٞ وَغَيۡرُ صِنۡوَانٖ يُسۡقَىٰ بِمَآءٖ وَٰحِدٖ وَنُفَضِّلُ بَعۡضَهَا عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖ فِي ٱلۡأُكُلِۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَعۡقِلُونَ

13:17.base_text: He sent down water from the sky, so valleys flowed—each according to its capacity—and the current carried swelling froth. And from what they burn in fire, seeking to make ornaments or utensils, comes a similar froth. Thus Allah exemplifies truth and falsehood: so as for the froth—it fades away, and as for what benefits mankind—it remains in the earth; thus Allah sets forth parables.
13:17.hafs_text: He sent down water from the sky, so valleys flowed—each according to its capacity—and the current carried swelling froth. And from what they burn in fire, seeking to make ornaments or utensils, comes a similar froth. Thus Allah exemplifies truth and falsehood: so as for the froth—it fades away, and as for what benefits mankind—it remains in the earth; thus Allah sets forth parables.
13:17.shubah_ar_text: أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَسَالَتۡ أَوۡدِيَةُۢ بِقَدَرِهَا فَٱحۡتَمَلَ ٱلسَّيۡلُ زَبَدٗا رَّابِيٗاۖ وَمِمَّا تُوقِدُونَ عَلَيۡهِ فِي ٱلنَّارِ ٱبۡتِغَآءَ حِلۡيَةٍ أَوۡ مَتَٰعٖ زَبَدٞ مِّثۡلُهُۥۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡحَقَّ وَٱلۡبَٰطِلَۚ فَأَمَّا ٱلزَّبَدُ فَيَذۡهَبُ جُفَآءٗۖ وَأَمَّا مَا يَنفَعُ ٱلنَّاسَ فَيَمۡكُثُ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡأَمۡثَالَ
13:17.hafs_ar_text: أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَسَالَتۡ أَوۡدِيَةُۢ بِقَدَرِهَا فَٱحۡتَمَلَ ٱلسَّيۡلُ زَبَدٗا رَّابِيٗاۖ وَمِمَّا يُوقِدُونَ عَلَيۡهِ فِي ٱلنَّارِ ٱبۡتِغَآءَ حِلۡيَةٍ أَوۡ مَتَٰعٖ زَبَدٞ مِّثۡلُهُۥۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡحَقَّ وَٱلۡبَٰطِلَۚ فَأَمَّا ٱلزَّبَدُ فَيَذۡهَبُ جُفَآءٗۖ وَأَمَّا مَا يَنفَعُ ٱلنَّاسَ فَيَمۡكُثُ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يَضۡرِبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلۡأَمۡثَالَ

15:8.base_text: We bestow not the angels from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.
15:8.shubah_text: The angels are not bestowed from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.
15:8.hafs_text: We bestow not the angels from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.
15:8.shubah_ar_text: مَا تُنَزَّلُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓاْ إِذٗا مُّنظَرِينَ
15:8.hafs_ar_text: مَا نُنَزِّلُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓاْ إِذٗا مُّنظَرِينَ

16:11.base_text: With it He germinates for you vegetation and olives and date-palms and grapevines and of all products. Indeed, in that is a sign for people who reflect.
16:11.shubah_text: With it We germinate for you vegetation and olives and date-palms and grapevines and of all products. Indeed, in that is a sign for people who reflect.
16:11.hafs_text: With it He germinates for you vegetation and olives and date-palms and grapevines and of all products. Indeed, in that is a sign for people who reflect.
16:11.shubah_ar_text: نُنۢبِتُ لَكُم بِهِ ٱلزَّرۡعَ وَٱلزَّيۡتُونَ وَٱلنَّخِيلَ وَٱلۡأَعۡنَٰبَ وَمِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ

16:12.base_text: And He has subjected to you the night and the day and the sun and the moon. And the stars are subjected by His command. Indeed, in that are signs for people who reason.
16:12.shubah_text: And He has subjected to you the night and the day and the sun and the moon and the stars—(all) subjected by His command. Indeed, in that are signs for people who reason.
16:12.hafs_text: And He has subjected to you the night and the day and the sun and the moon. And the stars are subjected by His command. Indeed, in that are signs for people who reason.
16:12.shubah_ar_text: وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ وَٱلشَّمۡسَ وَٱلۡقَمَرَ وَٱلنُّجُومَ مُسَخَّرَٰتِۭ بِأَمۡرِهِۦٓۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَعۡقِلُونَ
16:12.hafs_ar_text: وَسَخَّرَ لَكُمُ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ وَٱلشَّمۡسَ وَٱلۡقَمَرَۖ وَٱلنُّجُومُ مُسَخَّرَٰتُۢ بِأَمۡرِهِۦٓۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَٰتٖ لِّقَوۡمٖ يَعۡقِلُونَ

16:17.base_text: Is One Who creates like one who does not create? Will you never remind yourselves?
16:17.shubah_text: Is One Who creates like one who does not create? Will you not constantly remember?
16:17.hafs_text: Is One Who creates like one who does not create? Will you never remind yourselves?
16:17.shubah_ar_text: أَفَمَن يَخۡلُقُ كَمَن لَّا يَخۡلُقُۚ أَفَلَا تَذَّكَّرُونَ
16:17.hafs_ar_text: أَفَمَن يَخۡلُقُ كَمَن لَّا يَخۡلُقُۚ أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ

16:71.base_text: And Allah has favored some of you over others in provision, yet those who were favored do not give their provision to those whom they rightfully possess, to the extent of making them equal partners in it. Do they then repudiate the blessing of Allah?
16:71.shubah_text: And Allah has favored some of you over others in provision, yet those who were favored do not give their provision to those whom they rightfully possess, to the extent of making them equal partners in it. Do youpl then repudiate the blessing of Allah?

16:71.shubah_ar_text: وَٱللَّهُ فَضَّلَ بَعۡضَكُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖ فِي ٱلرِّزۡقِۚ فَمَا ٱلَّذِينَ فُضِّلُواْ بِرَآدِّي رِزۡقِهِمۡ عَلَىٰ مَا مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُهُمۡ فَهُمۡ فِيهِ سَوَآءٌۚ أَفَبِنِعۡمَةِ ٱللَّهِ تَجۡحَدُونَ
16:71.hafs_ar_text: وَٱللَّهُ فَضَّلَ بَعۡضَكُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖ فِي ٱلرِّزۡقِۚ فَمَا ٱلَّذِينَ فُضِّلُواْ بِرَآدِّي رِزۡقِهِمۡ عَلَىٰ مَا مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُهُمۡ فَهُمۡ فِيهِ سَوَآءٌۚ أَفَبِنِعۡمَةِ ٱللَّهِ يَجۡحَدُونَ

16:90.base_text: Indeed, Allah commands to justice and excelling in doing good and bringing (charity) to the relative, and He forbids obscenity and what is deplorable and oppression. He admonishes you, that you may remind yourselves.
16:90.shubah_text: Indeed, Allah commands to justice and excelling in doing good and bringing (charity) to the relative, and He forbids obscenity and what is deplorable and oppression. He admonishes you, that you may constantly remember.
16:90.hafs_text: Indeed, Allah commands to justice and excelling in doing good and bringing (charity) to the relative, and He forbids obscenity and what is deplorable and oppression. He admonishes you, that you may remind yourselves.
16:90.shubah_ar_text: ۞ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَأۡمُرُ بِٱلۡعَدۡلِ وَٱلۡإِحۡسَٰنِ وَإِيتَآيِٕ ذِي ٱلۡقُرۡبَىٰ وَيَنۡهَىٰ عَنِ ٱلۡفَحۡشَآءِ وَٱلۡمُنكَرِ وَٱلۡبَغۡيِۚ يَعِظُكُمۡ لَعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَّكَّرُونَ

17:7.base_text: If you excel in doing good, you excel in doing good to your own benefit; and if you do evil, you do so against yourselves. Then when the promise of the second time comes true, they will defile your faces, and they will enter the Mosque as they entered it the first time, and they will utterly destroy all that falls into their power.

Then when the promise of the second time comes true, He will defile your faces, and they will enter the Mosque as they entered it the first time, and they will utterly destroy all that falls into their power.

22:25.base_text: Indeed, those who have denied and bar (others) from the way of Allah and from the Inviolable Mosque, which We have designated for all mankind equally, (including) the one who consecrates himself therein and the visitor. 23:27.base_text: So We revealed to him: “Build the ship under Our eyes and according to Our revelation. And when Our command comes and the oven overflows, carry in it of each kind, a (male and female) couple, and your family except those of them against whom the word has already been pronounced. And do not speak to me concerning those who have done injustice; they will surely be drowned.”
23:27.shubah_text: ‘…of each (male and female) kind, one couple…’

And do not speak to me concerning those who have done injustice; they will surely be drowned.”

24:34.base_text: And We have most surely sent down to you clarifying signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).

24:35.base_text: Allah is the Light of the heavens and the earth. The parable of His light is as a niche wherein is a lamp; the lamp is in a glass; the glass is like a glittering planet, kindled from a blessed tree—an olive tree—neither eastern nor western. Its oil would almost illuminate even if no fire were to touch it. Light upon light. Allah guides to His light whomever He wills. Thus Allah sets forth parables for mankind. For Allah is All-Knowing of everything.
24:35.shubah_text: Allah is the Light of the heavens and the earth. The parable of His light is as a niche wherein is a lamp; the lamp is in a glass; the glass is like a glittering planet, kindled [referring to the glass] from a blessed tree—an olive tree—neither eastern nor western. Its oil would almost illuminate even if no fire were to touch it. Light upon light. Allah guides to His light whomever He wills. Thus Allah sets forth parables for mankind. For Allah is All-Knowing of everything.

24:36-37.base_text: (Such light shines) in houses which Allah has permitted to be raised up and in which His name is remembered. Highly exalting Him therein, mornings and before sunset, 37 are men whom neither bargain nor sale distracts from Allah’s remembrance or from establishing the prayers or from bringing the purifying charity, fearing a day when hearts and sight(s) are overturned,

24:55.base_text: Allah has promised those of you who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds that He will most surely make them successors in the land as He made those before them successors (of others), and that He will most surely establish for them their religion which He has approved for them, and that He will most surely substitute security in place of their fear—as they worship Me, never associating anything with Me. But whoever denies after that—those are the defiantly disobedient.
24:55.shubah_text: Allah has promised those of you who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds that He will most surely make them successors in the land as those before them were made successors (of others), and that He will most surely establish for them their religion which He has approved for them, and that He will most surely substitute security in place of their fear—as they worship Me, never associating anything with Me. But whoever denies after that—those are the defiantly disobedient.

24:58.base_text: O you who have attained faith, let those whom you rightfully possess and those of you who have not reached puberty seek your permission (before entering) on three occasions: before the dawn prayer and at noon when you lay aside your clothes and after the evening prayer—three occasions of privacy for you. At other times, neither you nor they commit sin by intermingling with one another; Allah thus clarifies the signs for you. For Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.

At other times, neither you nor they commit sin by intermingling with one another; Allah thus clarifies the signs for you. For Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.

28:82.base_text: And by morning the ones who only yesterday had wished they were in his position were saying, “Indeed, it is Allah who extends His provision for whomever He wills of His servants, and He restrains (it). Had Allah not been gracious to us, He would have caused it to swallow us. No wonder the deniers never succeed.”

30:50.base_text: So look sg at the effects of Allah’s mercy—how He revives the earth after its death; indeed, He is the Reviver of the dead, and He is All-Powerful over everything.

30:50.shubah_ar_text: فَٱنظُرۡ إِلَىٰٓ أَثَرِ رَحۡمَتِ ٱللَّهِ كَيۡفَ يُحۡيِ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بَعۡدَ مَوۡتِهَآۚ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمُحۡيِ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٞ

31:6.base_text: And among mankind is one who trades in distracting tales to make (people) stray from the way of Allah without knowledge, and to take it for a mockery; for those is a demeaning punishment.
31:6.hafs_text: And among mankind is one who trades in distracting tales to make (people) stray from the way of Allah without knowledge, and to take it for a mockery; for those is a demeaning punishment.
31:6.shubah_ar_text: وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ مَن يَشۡتَرِي لَهۡوَ ٱلۡحَدِيثِ لِيُضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ بِغَيۡرِ عِلۡمٖ وَيَتَّخِذُهَا هُزُؤًاۚ أُوْلَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمۡ عَذَابٞ مُّهِينٞ

31:20.base_text: Have youpl not seen that Allah has subjected to you whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth and showered you with His blessings, both manifest and hidden? Yet among mankind is one who argues about Allah without any knowledge nor any guidance nor any illuminating Scripture.

31:30.base_text: That is because Allah is the Truth, and because what they call upon apart from Him is falsehood, and because Allah is the All-High, the Supreme.
31:30.hafs_text: That is because Allah is the Truth, and because what they call upon apart from Him is falsehood, and because Allah is the All-High, the Supreme.
31:30.shubah_ar_text: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلۡحَقُّ وَأَنَّ مَا تَدۡعُونَ مِن دُونِهِ ٱلۡبَٰطِلُ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلۡعَلِيُّ ٱلۡكَبِيرُ

33:13.base_text: Recall, too, when a faction of them said, “O people of Yathrib, there is no staying for you here, so retreat.”
33:13.shubah_text: . . . there is no standing-place for you here . . .

33:30.base_text: O wives of the Prophet, if any one of you were ever to commit an evident obscenity, the punishment for her would be doubled twofold.
33:30.hafs_text: O wives of the Prophet, if any one of you were ever to commit an evident obscenity, the punishment for her would be doubled twofold.

34:5.base_text: Those who strove against Our signs, attempting to challenge (God) — those ones, for them is a painful punishment of torment.
34:5.shubah_text: . . . for them is a punishment of painful torment.
34:5.hafs_text: Those who strove against Our signs, attempting to challenge (God) — those ones, for them is a painful punishment of torment.

34:9.base_text: If We will, We can make the earth cave in beneath them, or let fall down on them pieces from the sky; indeed, in that is a sign for every penitent servant.
34:9.hafs_text: If We will, We can make the earth cave in beneath them, or let fall down on them pieces from the sky; indeed, in that is a sign for every penitent servant.
34:9.shubah_ar_text: أَفَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ إِلَىٰ مَا بَيۡنَ أَيۡدِيهِمۡ وَمَا خَلۡفَهُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِۚ إِن نَّشَأۡ نَخۡسِفۡ بِهِمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ أَوۡ نُسۡقِطۡ عَلَيۡهِمۡ كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَأٓيَةٗ لِّكُلِّ عَبۡدٖ مُّنِيبٖ

34:15.base_text: Surely, there used to be a sign for (the people of) Sheba in their residence: two gardens, on the right and on the left. “Eat pl of your Lord’s provision and give thanks to Him.” A good land and an Oft-Forgiving Lord.

34:40.base_text: And on the day when He herds them all together, then says to the angels, “Is it you that these used to worship?”

35:40.base_text: Say, “Have you regarded those associates of yours that you worship apart from Allah? Show me what they have created on earth.” Or do they have any share in the heavens? Or have We given them a scripture such that they rely on an evident proof from it? Rather, the unjust promise one another nothing but a deception.

47:4.base_text: Thus, when youpl encounter those who have denied, strike at their necks. Then when you have subjugated them, bind them firmly. Then either release them by grace or by ransom until war lays down its burdens. Had Allah willed, He could have defeated them Himself, but He thus tests some of you by means of others. As for those who were killed in the way of Allah, He will not let their deeds go to waste.
47:4.shubah_text: Thus, when youpl encounter those who have denied, strike at their necks. Then when you have subjugated them, bind them firmly. As for those who combated in the way of Allah, He will not let their deeds go to waste.

57:16.base_text: Is it not time for those who have attained faith: that their hearts should become reverent towards Allah’s Reminder and to that which came down of the truth, and not be like those who were given the Scripture previously, but for whom time became prolonged so that their hearts hardened, and many of them are defiantly disobedient?

66:8.base_text: O you who have attained faith, repent to Allah with sincere repentance; hopefully your Lord will remit your evil deeds and enter you into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, on the day when Allah will never disgrace the Prophet and those who believed with him. With their light streaming before them and to their right, they say, “Our Lord, perfect our light for us and forgive us; You are indeed All-Powerful over everything.”
